{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies two main contributions but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "Suggests a reorganization by proposing a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but the plan is not fully executed in the output.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (O(1) amortized random-read cost), and marks confidence and missing evidence for other recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as inconsistencies and likely-wrong characterizations.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies two main contributions but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests a reorganization by proposing a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but the plan is not fully executed in the output.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (O(1) amortized random-read cost), and marks confidence and missing evidence for other recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as inconsistencies and likely-wrong characterizations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
